actions.speaker: OPS
actions.text: This is the last gate. Expect fortress-grade resistance and no clean answers.

actions.speaker: OPS
actions.text: If the archive core is intact, bring back whatever it stored and who authorized the breach.

ARCHIVE CORE
Directive mismatch detected.
Containment protocol revoked by archive authority: ORPHEUS.
Local command objections logged, denied, and sealed.

actions.speaker: OPS
actions.text: Fortress cleared. The signal is still active somewhere below you.

actions.speaker: OPS
actions.text: This facility did not fail containment. Someone revoked it.

actions.speaker: OPS
actions.text: Archive authority ORPHEUS is still broadcasting. This sector is over, but the incident is not.
